package.name: fc_core
package.description: Pure C flight-controller core ported from the UAV26 STM32G431 firmware. No ROS or HAL dependencies; same controller math runs in Gazebo (fc_sim) and on the real STM32. Includes attitude/rate PID cascade, mixer, altitude ESKF, IMU/SBUS/Micolink frame parsers, and the companion-FC binary protocol codec.
